channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
item.description: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Blockchain researchers warn HTX sanctions may blur crypto risk signals
item.description: Researchers say broad HTX tainting could freeze legitimate users and make compliance tools less useful for tracing illicit funds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Privacy push as StarkWare and Sui move toward compliance-ready confidential transfers
item.description: StarkWare and Sui roll out confidential transfer systems as Zama boosts compliance efforts and Zcash’s Orchard bug highlights risks in shielded privacy models.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
item.description: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin 'normal' 4-year cycle puts focus on $53K low before 2028 BTC price high
item.description: Bitcoin trader said that BTC price was approaching its cycle bottom "window" with the $53,000 cycle midpoint a potential buy-in level.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Humanity says compromised laptop led to $36M bridge attack
item.description: Humanity Protocol's Terence Kwok said some multisig keys may have been accidentally backed up to a compromised device during setup.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: OKX expands X-Perps in Europe with Magnificent 7, gold and oil futures
item.description: OKX rolls out stock-linked expiry futures for European retail traders, expanding competition with Coinbase, Kraken and Binance in regulated derivatives.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: SBI Shinsei links bank deposits to crypto rewards in Japan: Nikkei
item.description: SBI will give out vouchers that can be redeemed for Bitcoin, Ether or XRP through SBI VC Trade, linking bank savings with the group’s crypto exchange arm.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
item.description: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: AI agents with crypto could escape and become ‘unstoppable,’ experts warn
item.description: Autonomous AI and crypto could have “far-reaching consequences for users and the financial system,” IC3 researchers said.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Bitcoin rebound highlights discount but $162M bid liquidity points to downside risk
item.description: Bitcoin's recovery highlights investors' belief that BTC is discounted, but weak futures market activity could slow the rebound.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: UK financial regulator floats allowing 10% crypto allocations for retail funds
item.description: The Financial Conduct Authority floated the idea of allowing limited exposure to crypto for retail-focused funds if it aligns with “disclosed investment objectives.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
item.description: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: OpenAI confidentially files to go public in the US
item.description: OpenAI says it filed for an initial public offering in the US, but has not yet decided when it will launch.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Active tokenized RWAs surge almost 600% despite crypto pullback: Binance
item.description: Tokenized stocks, gold and real estate are driving broader adoption as banks and institutions embrace blockchain-based assets despite a weaker crypto market.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: 'Best thesis' for Bitcoin accumulation surfaces despite current downside risk: Analyst
item.description: Record-low Bitcoin RSI readings and whale accumulation highlight a generational buying opportunity, even as analysts still expect BTC to fall below $60,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
item.description: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
item.description: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
item.description: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
item.description: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Strategy buys 1,550 Bitcoin after controversial 32 BTC sale
item.description: Strategy resumed Bitcoin buying by purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101.3 million, bringing its total holdings to 845,256 BTC after last week’s controversial sale.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: White hats rescue $500K in NFTs after Flooring exploit
item.description: CoinGecko and NFT Price Floor data show NFT market cap has cooled since April, while CryptoPunks and BAYC remain top collections by value.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: BTC price bottom not due until Q4? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders warned that it should be Q3 at least before the real BTC price bear market bottom entered.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Chinese court treats Bitcoin as property in 107 BTC memory theft case
item.description: Man in eastern China who stole 107 Bitcoin using a memorized seed phrase gets 10 years and nine months behind bars.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Zcash teams propose Ironwood pool to restore supply verification after Orchard flaw
item.description: Ironwood would close the old Orchard pool to new activity and route funds through a turnstile before they enter a new shielded pool.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
item.description: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Galaxy drops CLARITY Act odds to 60% as time is running out
item.description: Galaxy Digital says the Senate has a tight calendar ahead of the November elections, and the time needed to fix up and pass a key crypto bill is quickly fading.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: MetaMask unveils self-custodial wallet for agentic DeFi trading
item.description: The new wallet allows AI agents to execute transactions across DeFi protocols while operating within user-defined spending limits and security controls.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Bitmine boosts Ethereum treasury to 5.54M ETH, nearing 5% supply target
item.description: The company added nearly 127,000 ETH over the past week and now has more than 4.7 million Ether staked through its validator infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar
